relocation.package_summary: Anthropic typically offers a lump-sum relocation allowance rather than fully broker-managed moves for most roles. The amount varies by level and distance; senior individual-contributor roles such as Applied AI Architect commonly receive $20k–$45k lump sum to cover movers, temporary housing, flights, and related expenses. A sign-on relocation bonus may be included and is often subject to repayment if the employee leaves within 12–18 months.
relocation.policy_notes: Typically lump-sum (not tax-grossed-up in all cases). Relocation bonus or portion may have 12–18 month clawback/vesting period. No public detailed policy document located.

benefits.healthcare: Premium PPO and HDHP options available through major national insurers; employer pays majority of premium (exact % not publicly disclosed in recent postings)
benefits.dental_vision: Standard comprehensive dental and vision coverage included in benefits package
benefits.meals_provided: Breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks provided in-office at SF, NYC, and London hubs; Seattle office offers limited or no daily catering
benefits.mental_health: Modern Health or comparable platform; EAP included with multiple therapy/coaching sessions per year; dependent coverage available
benefits.other_perks: Learning stipend, commuter benefits, fitness/wellness reimbursement, generous parental leave (standard for tech: ~20 weeks maternity/paternity), no formal sabbatical policy noted

sentiment.blind_score: 3.8/5 — strong mission and comp praised; recent threads note increasing process slowness and some PM/eng friction
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.3/5 — recurring themes: brilliant colleagues, intense pace, high ownership, some burnout and opaque promotion paths
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Mixed in r/cscareerquestions and r/MachineLearning last 90 days. Positive on research impact and pay; criticism around interview length (8+ rounds) and perceived 'cult-like' intensity. Specific thread: 'Anthropic vs OpenAI 2026' notes high attrition in applied teams.
sentiment.x_pulse: Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei posts continue to emphasize safety culture and long-term focus; occasional ex-employee posts cite workload and preference for faster-moving labs.

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Anthropic recruiter' OR 'Anthropic talent' + 'Applied AI' OR 'Industries' OR 'forward deployed' — multiple recruiters post about these roles; no single name tied confidently to this exact title in public search results as of 2026-05-19.

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Anthropic' 'Applied AI Architect' OR 'Director of Solutions' OR 'Head of Industries' OR 'Strategic Operations' — role likely reports into an Industries/Solutions/Go-to-Market leader; no specific hiring manager identified from public job postings or recent org-chart leaks.
